title: DARUTO - UI
body:
- Update 10/03/2026
[Update]

A small overlay sits just above the hotbar showing the name.

The original HUD with the custom texture is back. The top bar still shows health in orange, and the bottom bar now displays chakra in blue instead of hunger.


Everything has been translated to English: all chat messages, command feedback, descriptions, level-up notifications, and code comments.

The keybinds are now just three: B (hold) to charge chakra.
